svg.title: sequence diagram
svg.desc: A sequence diagram with 3 nodes and 11 edges. flowing top to bottom. Key nodes: Client, Server, Database.. Key relationships: Client points to Server with label: POST /login; Server points to Database with label: SELECT user WHERE email=?; Database optionally points to Server with label: User record.. Layout spans 678 by 1566 units with 3 rendered node boxes and 11 routed edge paths.
